page_content:
CHEM441 Advanced Organic Chemistry (3 Credits)

An advanced study of the compounds of carbon, with special emphasis on molecular orbital theory and organic reaction mechanisms. Prerequisite: Must have completed or be concurrently enrolled in CHEM480 or CHEM481; and 1 course with a minimum grade of C- from (CHEM241, CHEM247).

Jointly offered with: CHEM641.
